name: Souldrinking Crystal
description: A barely perceptible shadow, in the shape of a screaming humanoid face, seems to flicker on this weapon. This weapon functions as an enervating weapon. In addition, when a souldrinking weapon scores a critical hit on a living creature, it grants you 5 temporary hit points and a +2 morale bonus on melee damage rolls. The temporary hit points do not stack with temporary hit points from any other source. This effect fades after 10 minutes.
